posts.author: BillyLu (Shi Lin Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s probably a fair number of marketing agencies that use Monday.com

We’re one of them, and our bread & butter is Email/SMS Marketing

Klaviyo is what we use instead of MailChimp

An seamless integration with Klaviyo will be very helpful for us as an agency:

  • Syncing segments / lists
  • Syncing campaigns
  • Syncing flows
  • Syncing KPIs / Metrics / Statistics

posts.author: Suresh (Suresh Sharma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BillyLu Would you like to have a quick chat about Klaviyo Integraion?
Schedule a meeting

posts.author: gochs (Geof Ochs)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever find a solution to this?

posts.author: andrus (Andrus Purde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jumping in from Outfunnel. We build simple, reliable integrations between sales and marketing tools, and I’m pleased to say that Monday is our newest integration.

Many agencies using Monday + Klaviyo are looking for better data flow without the zap-spaghetti.

Screenshot 2026-02-10 at 11.32.421776×1244 159 KB

With our Monday-Klaviyo integration, you can:

  • Sync contacts and segments from Monday boards to Klaviyo, and sync any data changes over 24/7

  • Keep email flows running smoothly with always-up-to-date data

  • (Syncing Klaviyo data back to Monday coming soon)

Check out the integration here. Happy to chat if you want more details!
